steps.title: Make two points for the line
steps.content: The point $(0,12)$ is already on the line. The slope is $2$, so when $x$ increases by $1$, $y$ increases by $2$. That gives a second point, $(1,14)$.

steps.title: Fit the points in Desmos
steps.content: Enter $x_1=[0,1]$ and $y_1=[12,14]$, then type $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=2$ and $b=12$, so the line is $y=2x+12$. This matches choice D — D is correct.
